title: UKRI annual report and accounts, 2024 to 2025
body: "This annual review sets out how UKRI has delivered the commitments in its corporate plan, how they are contributing to achieving its longer-term ambitions and ensuring that it is on track to deliver its strategy.  It includes:   statements from UKRI’s Chair and CEO  a detailed performance report updates on governance and accountability report  UKRI’s audited financial statements   "
